title: chore(image): remove dead code, files, and dependencies
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the hive
gist.blurb: We just swept out nearly 4,000 lines of dead code and unused dependencies from the image generation backend. A cleaner hive means a happier swarm.
gist.summary: Cleaned up the image generation backend by removing nearly 4,000 lines of dead code, unused files, and obsolete dependencies.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup reduces technical debt and includes a minor performance fix for feed listeners, keeping the platform running smoothly.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations.ai bee mascot wearing a tiny janitor's hat, sweeping up pixelated dust bunnies and old code snippets. The Nomnom creature happily eating a pile of deprecated code.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny janitor's hat, sweeping up crumpled pixelated code snippets with a small broom. Nearby, the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of deprecated files. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
